Proposal
Reference No. As per the decision taken in the meeting of the Hon'ble Cabinet dated 09.06.2026
1 The Ministerial Departments have been created by inclusion / division into other Departments as per the Government decision here.
Accordingly, the General Administration Department was bifurcated into a separate Department of Revenue and a separate Department of Information and Public Relations.
Divisions have been created. dated 17th January, at reference No.1 of the General Administration Department,
Revised structure of posts on establishment of General Administration (Self) approved by Government Decision, 2023
has been done. Creation of a separate division of Rajshisthatachar subdivision from the General Administration Department.
As a result, the matter of transferring the sanctioned posts of this subdivision as per the constitution to the Revenue Department is under consideration.
It was.
The Government's Decisions:
The next 40 posts in the Rajashisthachar subdivision under the General Administration Department are working in this post.
The officers / staff along with their assets are being transferred to the Revenue Department: -
